political.s: Firehouse Subs reported minimal political activity as of 2020, contributing $47,121 that cycle with no federal lobbying expenditures. The company focuses on public safety causes rather than political advocacy.

charity.s: Firehouse Subs founded the Firehouse Subs Public Safety Foundation in 2005 following Hurricane Katrina. The foundation has granted over $102 million across the United States and Canada to provide first responders with lifesaving equipment, education, and disaster relief. More than 70% of foundation funding comes from the restaurant brand and its customers.
charity.focus: First responder equipment, disaster relief, public safety education

environment.s: No significant public environmental initiatives, policies, or sustainability programs found. As a fast-casual restaurant franchise, the company has not disclosed environmental commitments or climate action plans.

labor.s: Employee reviews are mixed. Glassdoor rating of 3.3/5 with 47% recommending the company; compensation rated 2.2/5. Common complaints include low wages (minimum wage for entry-level), inconsistent scheduling, limited benefits for part-time workers, and variable management quality. Positive reviews cite flexible scheduling, team environment, and opportunities for entry-level workers.

dei.s: No public DEI policy, initiatives, or reporting found. The company has not disclosed diversity and inclusion commitments or metrics.

animals.s: Not applicable. Firehouse Subs is a restaurant chain serving meat-based submarine sandwiches; no animal testing policies are relevant to the business model.

guns.s: Not applicable. Firehouse Subs is a restaurant chain that does not sell, manufacture, or distribute firearms.

privacy.s: Limited public information available on data privacy practices. As a private restaurant franchise owned by Restaurant Brands International, the company collects customer data through loyalty programs but has not published a comprehensive privacy policy summary.

execPay.s: Not disclosed. As a private company subsidiary of Restaurant Brands International, executive compensation ratios are not publicly available.

sec.note: Pay ratio extracted from proxy filing — verify manually for accuracy
